infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Shii-Edu uses the camera when you choose to capture institute media.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Shii-Edu to use Face ID for secure institute sign-in.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Edu-Hub uses location while a driver is actively broadcasting a campus vehicle route.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Shii-Edu saves media only when you explicitly request it.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Shii-Edu uses your photo library when you choose images to upload.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Shii-Edu to use the camera when you choose to capture institute media.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow Shii-Edu to access photos you choose to upload.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Edu-Hub to share the live location of an active campus vehicle route.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Shii-Edu to use Face ID for secure institute sign-in.
Allow Shii-Edu to use Face ID for secure institute sign-in.
